title: Adversarial idea (one proposed change)
description: What a ResearchAgent returns: one proposed change. One idea per file under <sandbox_root>/iter<N>/ideas/. The Judge's scoring lives separately in verdict.schema.json.

grounded_in.description: The analysis finding it's built on: file + value/pattern.

prediction.description: Falsifiability gate: the checkable signal that would confirm/refute it next run.

refine_action.description: Set on refine: how the agent responded to the critique.

note.description: Optional: refinement reasoning, or the diagnostic requested when refine_action is analyze_then_refine.
